objective: Simplify and clean up the Google AI Pro description section, correcting the max invite count.

completed: Replaced two bulky description blocks with a single, concise description box.
Merged the warnings (AS 보장 / AS 제한) into the inline bullet points using color accents to maintain visibility without adding vertical bulk.

decisions_locked: Used inline span styling with font-weight: 700 to highlight the AS terms at the end of each line instead of requiring dedicated divs.
acceptance_criteria: Description section is visually cleaner and takes up less vertical space.
completed_items: Simplified Google AI Pro description block in redesign-v4v1.html.
